title: Reussia rotundifolia
taxonomy: Reussia rotundifolia is classified as a species of succulent flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It is native to the western part of the Western Cape Province in South Africa. Reussia rotundifolia is often found growing in sandy or stony soil in a variety of environments. This succulent has rounded, greyish-green leaves that are used for water storage, helping it to survive in arid conditions. The plant produces small white or pink flowers in the summer months.
